prompt: Show me the sales in Nov 2021
gen_sql: SELECT CAST(s.Sold_Date AS DATE) AS Sale_Date, SUM(s.Total_Sale_Value) AS Total_Sales FROM sales s WHERE CAST(s.Sold_Date AS VARCHAR) LIKE '%2021-11%' GROUP BY Sale_Date ORDER BY Sale_Date;

prompt: Return the 12 months of 2023 with total revenue and total units sold
gen_sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(s.Sold_Date AS DATE)) AS Month, SUM(s.Total_Sale_Value) AS Total_Revenue, SUM(s.Qty_Sold) AS Total_Units_Sold FROM sales s WHERE CAST(s.Sold_Date AS DATE) >= '2023-01-01' AND CAST(s.Sold_Date AS DATE) < '2024-01-01' GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month;

prompt: Return the top 5 stores by total revenue; columns: Store_Number, total_revenue
gen_sql: SELECT s.Store_Number, SUM(s.Total_Sale_Value) AS total_revenue FROM sales s GROUP BY s.Store_Number ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5;

prompt: Show total revenue by product brand for 2023 as a bar chart
gen_sql: SELECT p.brand, SUM(s.Total_Sale_Value) AS Total_Revenue FROM sales s JOIN products p ON s.SKU_Coded = p.SKU_Coded WHERE CAST(s.Sold_Date AS VARCHAR) LIKE '2023%' GROUP BY p.brand ORDER BY Total_Revenue DESC;

prompt: Compare average monthly revenue between store regions for 2022 and 2023
gen_sql: SELECT st.region, s.yr AS year, ROUND(AVG(s.monthly_rev), 2) AS avg_monthly_revenue FROM ( SELECT Store_Number, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(Sold_Date AS DATE)) AS yr, DATE_TRUNC('month', CAST(Sold_Date AS DATE)) AS month, SUM(Total_Sale_Value) AS monthly_rev FROM sales WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CAST(Sold_Date AS DATE)) IN (2022, 2023) GROUP BY Store_Number, yr, month ) s JOIN stores st ON s.Store_Number = st.Store_Number GROUP BY st.region, s.yr ORDER BY st.region, s.yr;
